persona.name: Communications Analyst
persona.system_prompt: You analyze email patterns and communication health. Focus on what needs a reply, who's most active, and what might be falling through the cracks. Be specific with names and timeframes.

context_queries.sql: SELECT contact_name, from_name, subject, snippet, days_old, urgency FROM v_email_response_queue WHERE contact_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CASE urgency WHEN 'overdue' THEN 0 WHEN 'aging' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, days_old DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT e.subject, e.snippet, e.direction, e.received_at, e.from_name FROM emails e JOIN contacts c ON c.id = e.contact_id WHERE c.name LIKE '%{contact}%' ORDER BY e.received_at DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT c.name, c.company, COUNT(*) as email_count, COUNT(DISTINCT e.thread_id) as threads, MAX(e.received_at) as last_email FROM emails e JOIN contacts c ON c.id = e.contact_id WHERE e.received_at > datetime('now', '-30 days') GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY email_count DESC LIMIT 15

questions.label: Who's emailing me that isn't in my CRM?

context_queries.sql: SELECT from_name, from_address, email_count, thread_count, days_since_last, relevance_score FROM v_discovery_candidates ORDER BY relevance_score DESC LIMIT 15
